cases.sql: ALTER TABLE x PARTITION(y = z) ADD COLUMN a VARCHAR(10)
cases.generated: ALTER TABLE x PARTITION(y = z) ADD COLUMN a VARCHAR(10)

cases.sql: ALTER TABLE x CHANGE a a VARCHAR(10)
cases.generated: ALTER TABLE x CHANGE COLUMN a a VARCHAR(10)

cases.sql: ALTER TABLE X ADD COLUMNS (y INT, z STRING)
cases.generated: ALTER TABLE X ADD COLUMNS (y INT, z STRING)

cases.sql: ALTER TABLE X ADD COLUMNS (y INT, z STRING) CASCADE
cases.generated: ALTER TABLE X ADD COLUMNS (y INT, z STRING) CASCADE

cases.sql: CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE x (y INT) ROW FORMAT SERDE 'serde' ROW FORMAT DELIMITED FIELDS TERMINATED BY '1' WITH SERDEPROPERTIES ('input.regex'='')
cases.generated: CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE x (y INT) ROW FORMAT SERDE 'serde' ROW FORMAT DELIMITED FIELDS TERMINATED BY '1' WITH SERDEPROPERTIES ('input.regex'='')

cases.sql: CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE `my_table` (`a7` ARRAY<DATE>) ROW FORMAT SERDE 'a' STORED AS INPUTFORMAT 'b' OUTPUTFORMAT 'c' LOCATION 'd' TBLPROPERTIES ('e'='f')
cases.generated: CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE `my_table` (`a7` ARRAY<DATE>) ROW FORMAT SERDE 'a' STORED AS INPUTFORMAT 'b' OUTPUTFORMAT 'c' LOCATION 'd' TBLPROPERTIES ('e'='f')

cases.sql: CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE X (y INT) STORED BY 'x'
cases.generated: CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE X (y INT) STORED BY 'x'

cases.generated: ALTER VIEW v1 AS SELECT x, UPPER(s) AS s FROM t2

cases.generated: ALTER VIEW v1 (c1, c2) AS SELECT x, UPPER(s) AS s FROM t2

cases.generated: ALTER VIEW db1.v1 RENAME TO db2.v2
